title: OIDC Authentication Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step implementation plan for adding OIDC authentication with multi-provider JWT validation and claims-to-role mapping.
notes: Implementation plan with file-structure tables and checkbox task steps referencing a separate design spec; competes with SPEC (technical file/interface contracts) but lacks endpoint/schema contract framing and is structured as an execution checklist rather than a standing technical contract, so classified as DOC/context. Synthesizer may prefer treating as SPEC-adjacent given interface/method signatures listed.
